title: Velloor Perunthatta Siva Temple
tagline: Velloor Perunthatta Siva Temple — spiritual town of Kerala

overview.short: Velloor Perunthatta Siva Temple is located at Velloor, near to Thalayolaparambu in Kottayam district.
overview.description: Velloor Perunthatta Siva Temple is located at Velloor, near to Thalayolaparambu in Kottayam district. The presiding deity of the temple is Shiva, located in separate sanctum sanatorum, facing east. It is believed that this temple is one of the 108 Shiva temples of Kerala and is installed by sage Parasurama dedicated to Shiva. It is one of the oldest Shiva temples in Kottayam District.

topPlaces.name: Kudappanakunnu Kunnathu Sri Mahadeva Temple
topPlaces.description: Kunnathu Sri Mahadeva Temple (കുന്നപ്പുറം, കുന്നത്ത്കാവ്)is located in the city of Thiruvananthapuram at Kudappanakunnu in Thiruvananthapuram district. The presiding deity of the temple is Lord Shiva, located in separate sanctum sanatoriums, facing east.

topPlaces.name: Kudappanakunnu
topPlaces.description: Kudappanakunnu is the headquarters of Thiruvananthapuram district in the Indian state of Kerala. Thiruvananthapuram Doordarshan Kendra and the District collectors office are the major landmarks here.

topPlaces.name: AKG Nagar
topPlaces.description: AKG Nagar is a residential locality within Peroorkada, Thiruvananthapuram (Trivandrum) in the Indian state of Kerala. There are 102 residential houses.

topPlaces.name: Kerala Law Academy
topPlaces.description: The Kerala Law Academy Law College (KLA) is a self-financing law college in Thiruvananthapuram, Kerala, India. Founded in 1967, it is the first, and was for many years the only, self-financing law institution in the state.

topPlaces.name: Mannanthala Anandavaleeswaram Temple
topPlaces.description: Mannanthala Anandavalleshwaram Devi Temple is a Hindu temple in the Mannanthala suburb of Thiruvananthapuram, India.

topPlaces.name: Peroorkada
topPlaces.description: Peroorkada is a suburb of Thiruvananthapuram in the state of Kerala, India. The area has a police station.

topPlaces.name: Mannanmoola
topPlaces.description: Mannammoola is a residential locality near Peroorkada to the north eastern part of Thiruvananthapuram (Trivandrum) in the Indian state of Kerala, on the way to vattiyoorkavu. Once a remote village, Mannammoola has seen rapid development over the last decade with the setting up of several residential colonies.

topPlaces.name: Mannanthala
topPlaces.description: Mannanthala is a suburb of Thiruvananthapuram, the capital of Kerala, India. It is located on the Main Central Road, after Nalanchira, in the direction of Kottayam.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Velloor Perunthatta Siva Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Velloor Perunthatta Siva Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Velloor Perunthatta Siva Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Thiruvananthapuram International Airport (9 km) and the nearest railway station is Thiruvananthapuram Central (8 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Velloor Perunthatta Siva Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Velloor Perunthatta Siva Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Velloor Perunthatta Siva Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Velloor Perunthatta Siva Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Velloor Perunthatta Siva Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Kudappanakunnu Kunnathu Sri Mahadeva Temple, Kudappanakunnu, AKG Nagar, Kerala Law Academy, Mannanthala Anandavaleeswaram Temple.
